verification.subject: Confirm your email — Vershkov.com
verification.heading: Email Verification
verification.message: Thank you for registering on vershkov.com. Please confirm your email address by clicking the button below.
verification.linkHint: Or copy this link into your browser:
verification.expiry: This link will expire in 24 hours.
verification.footer: If you did not create an account, you can safely ignore this email.

welcomeGoogle.subject: Welcome to Vershkov.com
welcomeGoogle.heading: Welcome!
welcomeGoogle.message: Your account has been successfully created using Google Sign-In. You can now access all available features.
welcomeGoogle.footer: This is an automated message. Please do not reply.

eventNotification.subject: Schedule Update - Vershkov.com
eventNotification.heading: Schedule Update
eventNotification.message: Your event '{title}' has been scheduled or updated.
eventNotification.footer: If you have any questions, please contact us.

bookingPending.subject: Booking request received - Vershkov.com
bookingPending.heading: Booking request received
bookingPending.message: You booked '{title}'. Your request is waiting for administrator approval.
bookingPending.footer: We will send a separate email once your booking is approved or declined.

bookingConfirmed.subject: Booking confirmed - Vershkov.com
bookingConfirmed.heading: Booking confirmed
bookingConfirmed.message: Your booking for '{title}' has been confirmed.
bookingConfirmed.footer: If you have any questions, please contact us.

eventCancellation.subject: Event Cancelled - Vershkov.com
eventCancellation.heading: Event Cancelled
eventCancellation.footer: If you have any questions, please contact us.

bookingRejected.subject: Booking request declined - Vershkov.com
bookingRejected.heading: Booking request declined
bookingRejected.message: Unfortunately, your booking request for '{title}' was declined.
bookingRejected.footer: You can choose another available slot in your schedule.

sessionReminder.footer: This is an automated reminder. Please do not reply.

accountDeletionRequest.subject: Confirm Account Deletion — Vershkov.com
accountDeletionRequest.heading: Account Deletion Request
accountDeletionRequest.message: We received a request to delete your Vershkov.com account. If you wish to proceed, click the button below.
accountDeletionRequest.warning: Warning: this action cannot be undone. All your data (history, bookings, survey results) will be permanently deleted.
accountDeletionRequest.linkHint: Or copy this link into your browser:
accountDeletionRequest.expiry: This link will expire in 24 hours.
accountDeletionRequest.footer: If you did not request account deletion, please ignore this email.

accountDeleted.subject: Your account has been deleted — Vershkov.com
accountDeleted.heading: Account Deleted
accountDeleted.message: Your Vershkov.com account and all associated data have been successfully deleted. Thank you for using our service.
accountDeleted.footer: If you have any questions, please contact us.

adminAccountDeleted.subject: User deleted their account — Vershkov.com
adminAccountDeleted.heading: User Account Deleted
adminAccountDeleted.footer: This is an automated system notification.
